arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Shei, Rocío, Lakrar, Yasmim, Teresa, Angeldahl, Weir, Athenea, Linda C., Bruun Shei starts on RB while Yasmim debuts on LB.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti delivers cryptic response to Rodrygo transfer speculation
arts.sum: Rodrygo's Real Madrid future has been called into question amid alleged interest from Saudi Arabia as well as Manchester City and PSG.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola says Real Madrid have become 'like a derby' fixture after giants are drawn to face each other once again in the Champions League
arts.sum: Manchester City felt deja vu on Friday after being paired with Real Madrid in the Champions League as Pep Guardiola claimed the grudge match is now a Clasico.

arts.ttl: The epic Champions League rivalry between Real Madrid and Man City
arts.sum: City went into the final round of games in the 36-team league phase needing to win just to secure the lifeline of a playoff . The Champions League’s most engrossing rivalry in recent years will resume in a two-legged playoff next month to reach the round of 16.
